calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of A Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Ronald G. Peck, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ELLIS PROPERTY, LLC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ALVIN LOUIE, ANGIE LOUIE, Individually and doing business as HANA ZEN RESTAURANT.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
William Courtney and Allen Shin sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $22,025.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $11,012.48
Attorney's Fees: $2,500.00
Costs: $490.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $36,077.48
Judgment signed in open court.
